violations.text: The ceiling above the hood system is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2025

No on-site manager certified in food safety was present during time of inspection. An on-site food safety manager must be present at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Corrective action - Establishment is to have a Food Safety manager scheduled at all times food is being prepared, handled, or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2024

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrective Action - Establishment provided with information for responding to vomit and diarrhea events. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (area above the pizza oven) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must remain clean to site and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024
The coving below the hand wash sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
